brief: Today's news spans political shifts from Sierra Leone dropping treason charges to U.S. Senate hearings for Trump nominees, China's economic slowdown, and Spain-Gibraltar border deal. Research highlights advances in human-computer interaction, AI-assisted writing, and health misinformation detection.
news_summary: Sierra Leone drops treason charges against ex-president Koroma; Senate confirmation hearings for Todd Blanche and Jay Clayton; China's economy grows 4.3% in Q2, slowest since 2022; Spain and Gibraltar remove border controls; Iran threatens trade routes amid U.S. strikes.
papers_summary: Papers explore cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), interdisciplinary AI research assistants (Aïra), and health misinformation in low-resource languages using SLMs.

en.brief: Today's news spans political shifts from Sierra Leone dropping treason charges to U.S. Senate hearings for Trump nominees, China's economic slowdown, and Spain-Gibraltar border deal. Research highlights advances in human-computer interaction, AI-assisted writing, and health misinformation detection.
en.news_summary: Sierra Leone drops treason charges against ex-president Koroma; Senate confirmation hearings for Todd Blanche and Jay Clayton; China's economy grows 4.3% in Q2, slowest since 2022; Spain and Gibraltar remove border controls; Iran threatens trade routes amid U.S. strikes.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore cross-domain multimodal emotion descriptors (CD-MED), graph database visualization (GraphPolaris), interdisciplinary AI research assistants (Aïra), and health misinformation in low-resource languages using SLMs.

zh.brief: 今日重點包括中國經濟增速放緩至4.3%創2022年底新低、涉芬太尼供應鏈的中國毒梟「王哥」在美受審，以及霸王龍化石創拍賣紀錄。
zh.news_summary: 中國第二季經濟增長4.3%低於目標，同時張智棟（王哥）因涉嫌掌控中美芬太尼供應鏈被關押美國；霸王龍化石以5010萬美元成交創紀錄。
zh.papers_summary: 本日研究聚焦人工智能在跨領域科學協作、情感計算與低資源語言健康錯誤訊息檢測方面的進展，另有多篇論文探討人類-機器人互動中的凝視與點頭生成。

todays_image.caption: The T. rex's reign ended in extinction, much like the attempted coup charge against Sierra Leone's ex-president has now been dropped, allowing a former ruler to escape a political extinction.
todays_image.title: Tyrannosaurus rex Osborn, 1905
